---
description: Turn a participant idea into a workshop-sized MVP specification.
agent: Domain Agent Designer
---

Define a workshop-sized MVP for this idea: `${input:idea:Describe the idea and target user}`.

The result must include the problem, one primary user journey, input/output contract, 2–4 reusable skills, one domain agent, one workflow, simple interface, safety boundary, and a definition of done suitable for a 90-minute build.
